ERISA Counsel RFP
Conflict Check & Engagement Request

Company
{{companyName}}
Date
{{sentDate}}
§ 01Purpose

Dear {{counselName}},

Forhemit Stewardship Management Co. is facilitating an ESOP transaction for {{companyName}}. We are requesting a conflict check and engagement availability from your firm to serve as ERISA counsel to the independent ESOP trustee.

This RFP outlines the transaction scope, anticipated work streams, and requested response items. If your firm can clear the conflict check and is interested, we will provide the full deal package for your review.

§ 02Transaction Overview
{{companyName}}
{{industry}}
{{location}}
{{entityType}}
100% ESOP — new plan
{{valuation}}
{{employeeCount}}
{{conversionStatus}}
{{sbaFinancing}}
120 days from engagement
§ 03Anticipated Scope

ERISA counsel will be engaged by and represent the independent ESOP trustee. Anticipated work streams include:

A.Conflict check. Confirm no existing relationship with the company, seller, or other parties that would impair independence.
B.Transaction structuring. Advise the trustee on ERISA compliance, fiduciary duties, and prohibited transaction exemptions.
C.Document review. Review the LOI, Stock Purchase Agreement, ESOP plan document, and trust agreement on behalf of the trustee.
D.Entity conversion. {{#if requiresConversion}}Advise on LLC/S-Corp to C-Corp conversion, including tax elections and state filings.{{else}}No entity conversion required.{{/if}}
E.Fiduciary guidance. Advise the trustee on prudence, loyalty, and adequate consideration throughout the transaction.
F.Closing opinions. Provide ERISA comfort letter or opinion at closing.
§ 04Requested Response

Please provide the following within 5 business days:

1.Conflict check results. Confirm no conflict with {{companyName}}, its owners, affiliates, or the identified trustee.
2.Experience confirmation. Confirm experience with 100% ESOP transactions and {{entityType}}-to-C-Corp conversions (if applicable).
3.Fee range. Standard engagement fee range for a transaction of this size and complexity.
4.Availability. Confirm availability to begin substantive work within {{timelineWeeks}} weeks.
Next step: Reply to deals@forhemit.com with your response. If clear, we will provide the full deal package and coordinate introduction to the trustee.
§ 05Forhemit's Role

For clarity: Forhemit is not the client. The ESOP trustee is the client. Forhemit coordinates the transaction and provides the deal package, but does not direct the trustee's legal counsel. ERISA counsel's professional relationship is with the trustee.

§ 06Contact
